qBittorrent vendor copy

This folder contains an unmodified Windows x64 copy of qBittorrent v5.2.3
from the official standard installer:
https://github.com/qbittorrent/qBittorrent/releases/tag/release-5.2.3

Official installer SHA-256:
ff508e2f912d59c9eabaf03633ebacfd45c2049f38dcac027b8a7d7ad867ab2f

Vendored qbittorrent.exe SHA-256:
f69360ae8545a64f4fc84fb6bacef03d77a6aa0793a4c14d4a28651ca26a27d1

Included runtime files:
- qbittorrent.exe
- qt.conf
- translations/

Included compliance files:
- COPYING
- COPYING.GPLv2
- COPYING.GPLv3
- AUTHORS
- qbittorrent-5.2.3.tar.xz (matching official source archive)

Source archive SHA-256:
7573621859da7287ba708378ea9f5eb12f30962a1a7c28eba5f44ecf8c4c114c

Project: https://www.qbittorrent.org/
Source code: https://github.com/qbittorrent/qBittorrent/tree/release-5.2.3
License: GPLv3+ for the binary distribution and GPLv2+ for source code, with
the OpenSSL linking exception stated in COPYING.

Keep these notices and the matching source archive with distributed builds.
Do not patch the vendored executable.
